_meta.description: Disease-area mix templates for big generics + biosimilar makers (Teva, Viatris, Sandoz, Sun, Cipla, Aurobindo, Hikma, Celltrion, etc.). Used by scripts/ops/expand_generic_mixes.py to auto-populate indications[] from a single 'mixTemplate' + 'totalSalesM' field, splitting franchise revenue across real disease areas so Market Explorer reflects generic share per area. Weights sum to 1.0 per template.
rules: Weights are rough industry-typical mixes (IQVIA prescription volume × generic share), not company-specific.
Override per-company unusual mix via 'mixOverrides' on the asset.
_other_minor weight goes to pseudo-area '_established_products.<ticker>_other_generics' for non-disease-mappable residual.
Updated when major class dynamics shift (e.g. branded LOE wave, biosim approvals).

us_generics_developed_v1._description: Typical US Tier-1 oral generics maker mix (sertraline/atorvastatin/lisinopril/omeprazole/etc). Heavy CV + CNS + GI.

eu_generics_developed_v1._description: Typical EU/UK Tier-1 generics maker mix; similar to US but heavier antibiotics + GI, lighter CNS.

emerging_markets_generics_v1._description: Emerging markets (India + LATAM + MENA + SE Asia + Africa) generics mix; very heavy antibiotics + cardio + diabetes; lighter CNS.

biosimilars_oncology_supportive_v1._description: Biosimilars portfolio mix (rituximab + bevacizumab + trastuzumab + adalimumab + filgrastim + pegfilgrastim + etanercept + epoetin classes). Heavy oncology + supportive care + autoimmune.
